Appearances:
Plaintiff Elite Investement is present. Represented by Clarus Leung
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendants Jeffrey Schmitz and Catherine Schmitz are present.
Attorney Zeenat Hassan appearing for both defendants in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Aug. 10, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
